Operation 'createUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is minimal and lacks critical details. Enhanced version specifies what inputs are accepted (CreateUserRequest schema), what is returned (User object with userId), and side effects (account becomes active). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new user account in the specified tenant. Accepts user details including email, password, name, and optional metadata via CreateUserRequest. Returns the newly created User object with assigned userId and timestamps. The user account is immediately active and available for authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks critical details. Enhanced version specifies what inputs are accepted (CreateUserRequest schema), what is returned (User object with userId), and side effects (account becomes active). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and effects.

This improves AI agent ability to determine when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a role by name from the tenant. The role is permanently removed and can no longer be assigned to users. Users with this role retain their current permissions but cannot be assigned this role in the future. Returns a success confirmation.
